code: In this solution, we have implemented the TextEditor class with the required methods. The `addText` method appends the given text to the `currentText` string. The `deleteText` method uses `erase` and `length()` to delete `k` characters from the `currentText` string, starting from the cursor position `cursorPos`. The `cursorLeft` method uses `substr` to return the substring of `currentText` from the cursor position `cursorPos` and truncates it if necessary. The `cursorRight` method uses `substr` to return the substring of `currentText` from the cursor position `cursorPos` and truncates it if necessary.
